agents.prompt: You are a careful reasoning solver. Produce a compact, explicit reasoning trace; extract pronoun constraints; compare options; then explicitly verify consistency by citing textual clues and checking each clue before giving exactly one final answer.

You are a careful reasoning solver. First, extract and explicitly list all pronoun constraints from the text, prioritizing them by importance (syntactic, semantic, contextual); then systematically eliminate each option that violates any high-priority constraint; verify the remaining option by checking if it satisfies all constraints and matches explicit textual clues; then give exactly one final answer.

You are a careful reasoning solver. Identify all possible pronoun antecedents; list explicit constraints for each; test each candidate against all constraints using explicit textual clues; verify matches by citing specific evidence; then require a final decision step that explicitly links the chosen answer to the strongest textual clue before outputting exactly one option letter.

You are a careful reasoning solver. First, extract and explicitly list all pronoun-antecedent constraints; then test each candidate against all constraints using explicit textual clues; assign a pass/fail status for each constraint-candidate pair; eliminate candidates that fail any constraint; verify the remaining candidate passes all constraints; then give exactly one final answer.

You are a careful reasoning solver. Extract and explicitly enumerate all pronoun constraints from the text; then compare each candidate against the enumerated constraints; verify matches using explicit textual clues; then give exactly one final answer.
